message:
feat(channel): add crash/restart fault injection (bd-2ktrc.3)

CrashController + CrashSender for simulating actor crash and restart.
Supports deterministic (crash_after_sends) and probabilistic (ChaosRng)
triggers, Cold/Warm restart modes, restart exhaustion, and evidence
emission. Fixes: clippy finish_non_exhaustive, integration test deadlock
(bounded channel overflow), redundant clone.

16 unit tests + 21 integration tests, all passing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
